content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on course navigating through the continuing left-hand bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 38, target = (38 + 5) % 121 = 43
- Target waypoint 43: (6.2298, 2.7700)
- Car: x=6.8555, y=2.3203, heading=116.68°
- dy = 2.7700 - 2.3203 = 0.4497
- dx = 6.2298 - 6.8555 = -0.6257
- bearing = atan2(0.4497, -0.6257) = 180° - atan2(0.4497, 0.6257) = 180° - 35.7° = 144.3°
- delta = 144.3° - 116.68° = +27.62°
- |delta| ≈ 28° → moderate left, use 15° steering at speed 1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track continues curving left and waypoint 43 is to the left of current heading (delta=+27.62°), maintaining 15° positive steering to follow the waypoint line through the continuing left curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight heading east (~0°), then curves sharply left around WP26-42",
    "After left curve peak (~WP43+), track heads west then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Car is left of center (~0.18m) — acceptable while navigating left curve",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Delta holding around +25-28° through this curve — 15° left correction working well",
    "After WP43+, heading will start decreasing (turning right/west) — prepare for negative steering",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used",
    "Car progressing smoothly through curve, heading increasing from 98° to 116°"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.993, 6.981, 6.942, 6.921, 6.856],
    "y": [2.112, 2.147, 2.198, 2.240, 2.320],
    "yaw": [101.2, 104.58, 107.5, 110.79, 116.68]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP43 at (6.230, 2.770): dy=0.450, dx=-0.626, bearing=144.3°, delta=+27.62° → moderate left, steer 15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
